steps.title: Identify slope and intercept
steps.content:
$$f(x)=7x+6$$
The function is in slope-intercept form $y=mx+b$. The slope $m=7$ represents the estimated growth in feet per year. The y-intercept $b=6$ gives the height when $x=0$.

steps.title: Find the initial height
steps.content:
$$f(0)=7\cdot0+6=6$$
When the tree was first measured ($x=0$), its estimated height is 6 feet. That is the correct answer.
